textByHashes.59d5e7e93acf1fa430fc1ba7a8ec5c97e26195fe: You don't seem very sure. We don't want any infected near the children. Be off with you!
textByHashes.01a9372878be50f29b3e635be06bc843985b9450: Whatever it is you're selling, we ain't interested!
textByHashes.cd3f0f29c97eb76f43df6ec2be2199aede672ce0: Did you not hear me? Clear off!
